history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade switched dependencies to jakarta.* but source code still references javax.* imports and uses deprecated Spring Security 5 APIs, causing compilation failures.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly running JavaxMigrationToJakarta will update all javax.* imports to jakarta.* in the source code to match the new Spring Boot 3 dependencies. SpringBoot3BestPractices will address remaining Spring Boot 3 and Spring Security 6 API incompatibilities before proceeding to the Java 21 build upgrade.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 because Spring Boot 3 dependencies (Jakarta EE) were introduced but source code still referenced javax.* imports and deprecated Spring Security 5 APIs like securityMatcher and ignoringRequestMatchers.
history.qwen_rationale: Combining UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3, JavaxMigrationToJakarta, and SpringBoot3BestPractices into a single step ensures that dependency upgrades, namespace migrations, and API modernizations are applied together before the post-step mvn compile check, preventing intermediate compilation failures caused by mismatched dependency and source versions.

history.qwen_observation: The build fails during the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step because source code still references javax.* namespaces and deprecated Spring Security APIs (securityMatcher) after dependencies were updated to Jakarta EE / Spring Boot 3.x.
history.qwen_rationale: Splitting the monolithic upgrade step into sequential migrations ensures that source code is updated to jakarta.* and modern Spring Security APIs before the dependency tree is switched to Spring Boot 3.x. This prevents classpath mismatches and compilation errors during the post-recipe build check.

history.qwen_observation: The standalone jakarta_migration step changed source imports to jakarta.* before dependencies were upgraded to Spring Boot 3, causing compilation failures because the classpath still provided javax.* APIs.
history.qwen_rationale: Remove the explicit jakarta_migration step and rely on UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 to atomically upgrade dependencies and migrate javax to jakarta in source code. This ensures the classpath matches the updated imports before the post-recipe compile check. The rest of the chain follows the standard Java 17 to 21 progression.

history.qwen_observation: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe updated dependencies to Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE) but failed to fully migrate source code imports (javax.* to jakarta.*) and Spring Security 6 API changes, causing compilation errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Combining UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 with explicit JavaxMigrationToJakarta and SpringBoot3BestPractices in a single step ensures that dependency upgrades, namespace migrations, and API updates are applied atomically before the compilation check. This resolves the mixed javax/jakarta imports and Spring Security 6 method signature mismatches.
